```python
def eligible_for_rental_subsidy(self) -> bool:
    """Determine eligibility based solely on financial need."""
    # Calculate rent-to-income ratio (monthly)
    monthly_income = self.annual_income / 12
    rent_burden_ratio = self.monthly_rent / monthly_income
    
    # Eligibility criteria: rent burden exceeding 30% of income
    return rent_burden_ratio > 0.3
```
